intro: Habenaria forceps, also known as Forceps Orchid or Forceps Habenaria, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae) that is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The bioactive constituents of Habenaria forceps include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Habenaria forceps include decoctions, infusions, and powders, often used to treat respiratory problems and as a natural remedy for colds and flu.
